title: circuit
description: SPICE-ready circuit definition. Each element maps directly to a SPICE netlist line. Components may optionally reference their physical EAS entry (inline or by URI into TAS/data).

title.description: Circuit title (appears as the first line of the generated SPICE netlist)

elements.description: List of SPICE circuit elements. Each element corresponds to one netlist line.

models.description: SPICE .model and .subckt definitions required by elements in this circuit.

element.description: One SPICE circuit element (R, L, C, K, V, I, M, D, Q, X, B, etc.).

name.description: SPICE reference designator. Must begin with the SPICE type letter (e.g. 'R1', 'L_pri', 'C_out', 'Q1', 'D_sec', 'V_in', 'K1').

nodes.description: Ordered SPICE node list for this element. Order follows SPICE convention: R/L/C: [+, -]; diode: [anode, cathode]; MOSFET: [drain, gate, source, body]; BJT: [collector, base, emitter]; coupling K: [] (linked via coupledInductors); voltageSource: [+, -].

value.description: Component value in SI units (Ω, H, F). Null for active devices where the model defines all parameters.

model.description: SPICE model or subcircuit name to use for this element (e.g. 'NMOS_SiC', 'MBRS340'). References a name in circuit.models or an externally defined .lib.

coupledInductors.description: For coupling elements (K) only: the two inductor names being coupled.

parameters.description: Additional SPICE element parameters as key-value pairs (e.g. {"ic": 0, "tc1": 0.003} for initial conditions or temperature coefficients).

eas.description: Optional link to the physical component in the TAS database. Either a full inline EAS document, or a reference object identifying the entry by category + partNumber (stable across NDJSON reordering).

oneOf.description: Reference to an entry in TAS/data by stable identity — not by line number.

partNumber.description: Manufacturer part number — maps to datasheetInfo.part.partNumber (or manufacturerInfo.reference for magnetics). Must be unique within the category.

modelDefinition.description: A SPICE .model or .subckt block required by this circuit.

name.description: Model or subcircuit name (referenced by element.model)

kind.description: Whether this is a .model statement or a .subckt block

text.description: Raw SPICE text of the .model or .subckt definition
